definition.procedurexml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="event_trigger" deletable="false" x="0" y="65"><field name="trigger">entity_ticks</field><next><block type="java_code"><field name="CODE">if (entity == null)&#10;        return;&#10;    if (!(entity instanceof LivingEntity livingEntity))&#10;        return;&#10;&#10;    // === Создаём AIRS_TAG внутри метода (единственный способ для MCreator) ===&#10;    TagKey<Block> AIRS_TAG = TagKey.create(&#10;        Registries.BLOCK, &#10;        ResourceLocation.parse("ssc14:airs") // ← БЕЗ пробелов в конце!&#10;    );&#10;&#10;    // === 1. Проверка измерения ===&#10;    boolean isInSpace = entity.level().dimension().equals(&#10;        ResourceKey.create(Registries.DIMENSION, ResourceLocation.parse("ssc_14:spaced"))&#10;    );&#10;&#10;    if (!isInSpace) {&#10;        if (livingEntity.getAttributes().hasAttribute(Attributes.GRAVITY))&#10;            livingEntity.getAttribute(Attributes.GRAVITY).setBaseValue(0.08);&#10;        livingEntity.setNoGravity(false);&#10;        return;&#10;    }&#10;&#10;    // === 2. Проверка гравитации станции ===&#10;    if (!Ssc14ModVariables.station_gravity) {&#10;        if (livingEntity.getAttributes().hasAttribute(Attributes.GRAVITY))&#10;            livingEntity.getAttribute(Attributes.GRAVITY).setBaseValue(0);&#10;        livingEntity.setNoGravity(true);&#10;        return;&#10;    }&#10;&#10;    // === 3. Поиск пола (цикл вместо 7 if) ===&#10;    int floorDistance = -1;&#10;    BlockPos entityPos = entity.blockPosition();&#10;    &#10;    for (int i = 1; i <= 7; i++) {&#10;        BlockState state = entity.level().getBlockState(entityPos.below(i));&#10;        if (!state.is(AIRS_TAG)) {&#10;            floorDistance = i;&#10;            break;&#10;        }&#10;    }&#10;&#10;    // === 4. Установка гравитации ===&#10;    double gravity;&#10;    boolean noGravity;&#10;    &#10;    if (floorDistance <= 0) { gravity = 0; noGravity = true; }&#10;    else if (floorDistance <= 5) { gravity = 0.08; noGravity = false; }&#10;    else if (floorDistance <= 6) { gravity = 0.04; noGravity = false; }&#10;    else if (floorDistance <= 7) { gravity = 0.01; noGravity = false; }&#10;    else { gravity = 0; noGravity = true; }&#10;&#10;    if (livingEntity.getAttributes().hasAttribute(Attributes.GRAVITY))&#10;        livingEntity.getAttribute(Attributes.GRAVITY).setBaseValue(gravity);&#10;    livingEntity.setNoGravity(noGravity);</field><comment pinned="false" h="41" w="121"> Версия ИИ</comment><next><block type="java_code"><field name="CODE">//НИЖЕ КОСТЫЛЬ, не трогать, нужен для MC</field><next><block type="controls_if"><comment pinned="false" h="54" w="149">КОСТЫЛЬ, НЕ ТРОГАТЬ</comment><value name="IF0"><block type="compare_dimensionids"><value name="a"><block type="get_dimensionid"><field name="dimension">End</field></block></value><value name="b"><block type="entity_dimension_id"><value name="entity"><block type="entity_from_deps"></block></value></block></value></block></value><statement name="DO0"><block type="entity_set_nogravity"><value name="entity"><block type="entity_from_deps"></block></value><value name="gravityValue"><block type="logic_boolean"><field name="BOOL">FALSE</field><comment pinned="false" h="57" w="133">Не отключает гравитацию</comment></block></value></block></statement></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
